headline: SCOTUS 🏛️🛡️ BLOCKS 🍊🔥 Trump from FIRING Fed GUV 💸👩‍⚖️ Cook!
text: SCOTUS 🏛️⚖️ SLAMS the BRAKES 🚫🍊 on Trump’s attempt to YEET 🍆💥 Fed Governor Lisa Cook from the money throne 💰👑! In a 5-4 JUSTICE DROP 💦🧑‍⚖️, the Supremes said the admin forgot to serve her that DUE PROCESS TEA ☕⚖️, so she can clap back at the mortgage fraud allegations 🏠🧾🚫! The beef gets sent back to the lower courts where Trump’s team gotta prove Cook did the double-dip home loan crime 🏠➕🏠=😈 before they can pink-slip her 👋💼! Cook already said NAH FAM 🖐️, calling the fraud claims a FAKE NEWS PRETEXT 🍔📜 to let the Orange One 🟠👑 grab the Fed’s joystick 🎮💹! Paul Clement, her lawyer 🧔‍♂️📜, told the bench the admin’s stunt would turn Congress’s Fed shield 🛡️ into a total JOKE 🤡😂! Meanwhile Solicitor General John Sauer 🧑‍⚖️ argued the Truth Social post was all the NOTICE needed, calling any slip-up ‘NEGLIGENCE’ that could SHAKE confidence in the money temple 💸🏛️. By law a prez can only BOOT 🥾 Fed governors ‘FOR CAUSE’ so the central bank stays INDEPENDENT 🦅 and doesn’t get turned into a political piñata 🎉🪅! Fed stans are popping bottles 🍾 because this keeps the long-term economy safe from short-term MAGA tweets 📱🔥! Cook’s already lawyering up to sue the prez over the firing order, turning this into the ultimate Trump vs Fed cage match 🥊💰! The economy’s watching like it’s the Super Bowl of monetary policy 🏈📈—no cap, no cap!
